Label: bug
Description: 🐞 A bug that needs to be fixed.

Label: feature
Description: ✨ A new function or feature.

Label: enhancement
Description: 🚀 An improvement to an existing function or feature.

Label: refactor
Description: ♻️ Code refactoring without changing functionality.

Label: documentation
Description: 📚 Changes or additions to the documentation.

Label: test
Description: 🧪 Add, update, or improve tests.

Label: dependencies
Description: 📦 Add, update, or remove dependencies.

Label: security
Description: 🔒 A security-related change or vulnerability.

Label: performance
Description: ⚡ Performance or resource usage optimization.

Label: priority: high
Description: 🔴 High priority – should be addressed soon.

Label: priority: medium
Description: 🟡 Medium priority – important but not urgent.

Label: priority: low
Description: 🟢 Low priority – can be addressed later.

Label: status: in progress
Description: 🚧 Work on this issue or PR is currently in progress.

Label: status: blocked
Description: 🚫 Cannot proceed due to a dependency, blocker, or unresolved issue.

Label: status: needs review
Description: 👀 Ready for review or feedback.

Label: status: needs discussion
Description: 💬 Requires discussion or a decision before implementation.

Label: area: frontend
Description: Affects the frontend or user interface.

Label: area: backend
Description: Affects backend logic or services.

Label: area: api
Description: Affects APIs or external/internal interfaces.

Label: area: database
Description: Affects the database, schema, or migrations.

Label: area: ci/cd
Description: Affects build, deployment, or CI/CD pipelines.

Label: good first issue
Description: 🌱 Suitable for new contributors.

Label: help wanted
Description: 🤝 Help from the community or team is welcome.

Label: technical debt
Description: 📋 Technical debt that should be addressed over time.
